arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City team for Blackburn Rovers with Charlie Hughes and Mason Burstow calls made
arts.sum: Hughes will be back for the visit of Rovers on Saturday, while Mason Burstow's first goal for the Tigers at the Riverside Stadium will have him pushing for a start. City's predicted starting XI: Pandur, Giles, Hughes, Jones, Coyle (c), Simons, Slater, Longman, Palmer, Kamara, Burstow.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers predicted team and John Eustace's Lewis Travis replacement
arts.sum: How Blackburn Rovers might line-up at the MKM Stadium this afternoon

arts.ttl: Hull City keen to evoke memories of Acun Ilicali's big night to spark season into life
arts.sum: That winter's night, an explosion of excitement brought the MKM Stadium to life, with Ryan Longman's two assists helping inspire City to a 2-0 win over a Blackburn Rovers side that was unbeaten in ten and going well. The night of January 19, 2022, is one that will be etched into the minds of Hull City fans for years to come.

arts.ttl: Ruben Selles' first words after becoming new Hull City head coach
arts.sum: City struck a deal earlier this week with Reading to speak to their Spanish boss, and once the compensation package had been agreed with the Royals, negotiations with Selles happened very quickly, and he said his goodbyes at the club's Bearwood training ground on Thursday, with coaches James Oliver-Pearce and Tobias Loveland following him to East Yorkshire. Ruben Selles says he had no hesitation in accepting Acun Ilicali's offer to become the new head coach of Hull City, after penning a two-and-a-half year deal at the MKM Stadium, with the option of a third on Friday evening.

arts.ttl: Hull City appoint Ruben Selles as new boss after agreeing compensation package with Reading
arts.sum: Selles emerged as Acun Ilicali's number one target earlier this week, and once City agreed a compensation package with Reading, talks with the Spaniard happened quickly, with the 41-year-old making it clear he relished the chance to take over the struggling Championship club. Hull City appointed Ruben Selles as their new head coach a little over a week after Tim Walter's departure and after agreeing terms with League One side Reading.

arts.ttl: Player likely to be sold just months after signing from Hull City – Not in manager’s plans
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Trabzonspor could look to sell Ozan Tufan just months after arriving from Hull City. The Turkey international signed for the Super Lig side for an undisclosed fee in July, but he’s struggled to find the form he showed with the Championship side. arts.ttl: Expert view on Ruben Selles as Hull City promised to have fun with new boss
arts.sum: Then I believe we could have a lot of fun," and it's a quote that will be music to the ears of the players, and fans, at the MKM Stadium after Walter's confrontational approach. Selles, who has developed a reputation for an intense, high-pressing game, came up against City in pre-season, comfortably beating Tim Walter's team 2-0 in the final friendly of the summer, so there will be some players in the current dressing room that have seen his approach up close and personal.

arts.ttl: Todd Cantwell: Mum's critique, finding happiness and Blackburn Rovers ambitions
arts.sum: Todd Cantwell was in reflective mood as he discussed life at Blackburn Rovers, family and how the team can show they're 'serious'

arts.ttl: Hull City keen on Manchester United player – Transfer to Championship would be big surprise
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Championship club Hull City are showing interest in Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayındır. The Turkey international has struggled to get game for the Premier League side since arriving during the 2023 summer transfer window and may need to move on in the new year. arts.sum: Elliott Jackson and Ryan Hildred sat down for the latest episode of Arte et Labore ahead of Blackburn Rovers' trip to Hull City
